heading: Home, Family, DIY & Everyday Life
para1:
Hi, I’m Taylor.
I’m a wife, mom to five boys, DIYer, home renovator, and content creator.
My corner of the internet is a reflection of real life... busy, sometimes messy, and full of the things I love. Whether I’m traveling, working on a home renovation project, sharing a family recipe, or finding ways to make the most of what we have, I love bringing my audience along with me.
para2: Last year, my family and I bought a fixer-upper on the water, and I've loved sharing the transformation along the way. While we tackle larger renovation projects, I also enjoy finding simple, budget-friendly updates that make a big impact. I believe it doesn't take a huge budget to create a home you love, sometimes a coat of paint, a thrifted find, or a small change in a room can bring so much joy. I love showing both the process and the finished result, along with affordable ideas that anyone can try.
para3: I started sharing my life online simply because I enjoy connecting with people and sharing ideas that have worked for our family. My hope is that whether you’re here for home projects, recipes, travel, decorating, or everyday life, you leave feeling inspired to try something new and make the most of where you are right now.
